title: ilex tonkinensis
intro: Ilex tonkinensis, also known as the Chinese holly or Vietnamese evergreen holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ilex tonkinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
